text_block_list.name: Tosen Jordan
text_block_list.text:
Hm? Is that the Three Goddesses? What am I
doing here?

text_block_list.name: Tosen Jordan
text_block_list.text:
I must be really exhausted... I'm just gonna take a
little break.

text_block_list.name: Tosen Jordan
text_block_list.text:
You know, I've never really looked closely at this
statue...

text_block_list.name: Tosen Jordan
text_block_list.text:
Oh wow, they've got the perfect selfie poses!
That's the Goddesses for ya! Always on point!
